'''thasawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dob|dob]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-s-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dob|dob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thasawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsæwæth|thæsæwæth]] || [[word:thæsæwæj|thæsæwæj]] || [[word:thæsæwæsh|thæsæwæsh]] || [[word:thæsæwæ|thæsæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thasasawath|thasasawath]] || [[word:thasasawaj|thasasawaj]] || [[word:thasasawash|thasasawash]] || [[word:thasasawa|thasasawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasawath|thasawath]] || [[word:thasawaj|thasawaj]] || [[word:thasawash|thasawash]] || [[word:thasawa|thasawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasafwath|thasafwath]] || [[word:thasafwaj|thasafwaj]] || [[word:thasafwash|thasafwash]] || [[word:thasafwaf|thasafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thasawatha|thasawatha]] || [[word:thasawaja|thasawaja]] || [[word:thasawasha|thasawasha]] || [[word:thasawaka|thasawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thasawath|thasawath]] || [[word:thasawaj|thasawaj]] || [[word:thasawash|thasawash]] || [[word:thasawa|thasawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thasawathal|thasawathal]] || [[word:thasawajal|thasawajal]] || [[word:thasawashal|thasawashal]] || [[word:thasawakal|thasawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thasawathatha|thasawathatha]] || [[word:thasawajaja|thasawajaja]] || [[word:thasawashasha|thasawashasha]] || [[word:thasawaka|thasawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thasawathan|thasawathan]] || [[word:thasawajan|thasawajan]] || [[word:thasawashan|thasawashan]] || [[word:thasawakan|thasawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thasawathaoro|thasawathaoro]] || [[word:thasawajaoro|thasawajaoro]] || [[word:thasawashaoro|thasawashaoro]] || [[word:thasawakaoro|thasawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
